summary: Monte Carlo simulation of max intraday VIX over Jan 19-30 window. Blended model: p10=15.5, p50=20.5, p90=29. Key catalysts: Inauguration Day (Jan 20), FOMC (Jan 28-29), earnings season.
content: Current VIX: 14.51 (Jan 2, 2026). VIX has declined from ~28 to ~14.5 over past 6 weeks. Window has 9 trading days. Used mean-reverting OU process on log-VIX with jump component, blending conservative (theta=17) and aggressive (theta=19, higher jump rate) models. Key catalysts in window: Presidential Inauguration Jan 20, FOMC Jan 28-29, peak earnings season (MSFT/META/TSLA late Jan).
